channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: Bear Republic Brewing: Racer 5 IPA, Ep. 134
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
IPA’s come in many different forms, some bitter, some almost sweet. This week on Beer America TV, we’re talking about Racer 5 from Bear Republic Brewing, which does an excellent job balancing both . This 4-time GABF medal winner is another great example of what a quality IPA should taste like! Now why in the […]

The post Bear Republic Brewing: Racer 5 IPA, Ep. 134 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Anderson Valley Brewing: Brother David’s Triple Abby Style Ale, Ep. 125
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
In honor of our good friend and contributing vlogger David Little, John and Paul talk about Brother David’s Triple Abby Style Ale from the Anderson Valley Brewing Company located in Boonville, California. This Triple is complex, but well balanced with a strong malt backbone blended with spicy hops! The 10% ABV isn’t upfront, which is […]

The post Anderson Valley Brewing: Brother David’s Triple Abby Style Ale, Ep. 125 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Russian River: Blind Pig – Ep. 65
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Russian River Brewmaster Vinnie Cilurzo takes a beer from his Blind Pig Brewing Company days and shares it with us all . This bold IPA is sure to be a winner with people who love the style, and better yet, with a 6% ABV, it’s easy to drink and can be enjoyed year round. A […]

The post Russian River: Blind Pig – Ep. 65 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Episode 30 – He’Brew Jewbelation Twelve
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Forget 8 days of celebration – Jewbelation Twelve has 12 hops, 12 malts, and has a hefty 12% ABV! Schmaltz brewed this beer with a fair amount of Chutzpah for sure!

The post Episode 30 – He’Brew Jewbelation Twelve first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.
